message:
style: apply rustfmt to binomial BTPE, linalg oracle tests, and conformance assertions

Mechanical formatting: collapse multi-line arithmetic expressions in BTPE
binomial squeeze step, reformat function signatures and assert_oracle_vec
calls in linalg oracle tests, and vertically expand assert_eq! in
conformance negative_binomial test. No behavioral changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
